text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I've told you all sorts of secrets about
myself, haven't I?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Today will be the final one. Revealing this one
place is going to be the most embarrassing for
me, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I want you to know everything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen and I are on our way back to the
academy after a day out when she suddenly
decides to take me on a detour to...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A public bath?! No. That's far from what I meant
by "embarrassing."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Please, wipe such vulgar suggestions out of your
head. The place I'm most ashamed of is—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Skreeee!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. When I come here, I can't help but harbor
the most improper desires.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I always end up harboring the most unacceptable
of dreams.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I experience an unbearable setback, I
come here and find myself thinking, "I want to fly
somewhere far away."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But I am a member of the proud Mejiro family.
The obligation to remain steadfast and strong has
been deeply ingrained into me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Still, every once in a while, I yearn to live a simple
life beyond the horizon.
choice_data_list: That's not something to be ashamed ab—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: No, this is the most shameful feeling I have.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To be born a Mejiro, and then to want to throw
that away...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's the most reprehensible betrayal towards my
grandmother, who loves me so dearly. But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This, too, is part of who I am. My elegance is
mere pretense. A mere bluff.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In truth, I'm pitifully weak—nothing more than a
child.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I might not be able to meet the expectations
you've set for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
With that said... are you still willing to help me
grow?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Are you... feeling disappointed? Be honest.
choice_data_list: I'm not disappointed in the slightest.
I'm not disappointed in the slightest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Those eyes of yours... I see no trace of doubt
within them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Of course you wouldn't be
disappointed. That's why I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe. That's why I'm glad I brought you here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I feel so much better now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen smiles happily. A heavy burden
seems to have been lifted off her shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Still, there is a certain charm in the idea
of traveling abroad.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
There are things one can only learn in a foreign
country. I would still like to go someday, but not
as a means of escape.
choice_data_list: Why don't we go together sometime?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What? You and I?! Well, that sure came out of
the blue!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But... yes. That would be enjoyable. We're
batterymates, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So... where would you like to go?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: France... Yes, of course, I see your intent.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I would like to go there someday and represent
Japan as an Umamusume. I shall train even harder
in anticipation of that day!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
New Caledonia... I feel like I've heard of it. I
suppose that would be an option too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I learn something new every day. Could you tell
me what you know about the place?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Th-the Mejiro Kingdom? Are you half-asleep, or
something? There's no such thing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, but it would be amusing if it were real.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: If such a kingdom did exist, I would be Queen, rather than McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us talk about our endless dreams as
we gaze up at the blue sky with airplanes soaring
overhead.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for today. I feel as though I've
gotten closer to you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ahem. From now on, I will keep no secrets. I hope
you will someday share all of yours with me, as
well.
